case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. NAJI LAHHOUD et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST AS TO DEFENDANT LAHHOUD, NAJI INDIVIDUALLY  AND DBA NAJI'S AUTO BODY DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-24-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-20-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-09-2006
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED OCT-31-2005, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAHHOUD, NAJI INDIVIDUALLY  AND DBA NAJI'S AUTO BODY

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $221.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LAHHOUD, NAJI INDIVIDUALLY  AND DBA NAJI'S AUTO BODY
DECLARATION DOUGLAS HOLLOWAY FILED RE: DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION ANSON LOUIE FILED RE: COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORD (EVID CODE 1521, 1550) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION ERNEST I. KNOWLES FILED RE: DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION MARK SCHICKENDANTZ FILED RE: EQUIPMENT VALUATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAHHOUD, NAJI INDIVIDUALLY  AND DBA NAJI'S AUTO BODY POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 1 UNIVERSAL MEASURING SYSTEM, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $5,365.36 DAMAGES, $875.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $221.30 COSTS, $89.67 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,551.33, EQUIPMENT HAS A FAIR MARKET VALUE OF $500.00. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-24-2006, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
